event: Woman reclining in ornate Islamic architecture
description: A photograph showing a woman in a blue patterned garment reclining against the base of an ornate archway covered entirely in intricate geometric Islamic mosaic tilework in blue, white, and earth tones. Through the arch, another doorway is visible leading into a series of receding rooms. The woman sits on the tiled floor, her body merging visually with the surrounding geometric patterns. The photograph has a dark border frame.
